---
title: "Encyclopedia of Indian Food Ingredients"
subtitle: "IFID v2.0 · 623 ingredients · 8 categories"
---

## About This Encyclopedia

The **Indian Food Ingredients Database (IFID)** is a standardized taxonomy of food components found in the Indian food ecosystem — from traditional botanicals and Ayurvedic herbs to modern food additives and functional ingredients.

This encyclopedia bridges traditional knowledge and contemporary FMCG standards, providing structured, sourced descriptions of each ingredient across four dimensions:

- **History & Sourcing** — origin, cultivation, and historical use in India
- **Home Kitchen Use** — how the ingredient appears in domestic cooking
- **Industrial Applications** — role in packaged food manufacturing
- **Distinctions & Common Confusion** — how to tell it apart from similar ingredients

**Version:** 0.2.0-alpha
**DOI:** [https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18650862](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18650862)
**License:** Open Data Commons Attribution License (ODC-By)
**Author:** Lalitha A R, Interdisciplinary Systems Research Lab (iSRL)

---

## Categories

- **[Additives & Functional](additives-functional/index.qmd)** — 263 ingredients
- **[Dairy & Alternatives](dairy-alternatives/index.qmd)** — 23 ingredients
- **[Fruits, Veg & Botanicals](fruits-veg-botanicals/index.qmd)** — 164 ingredients
- **[Oils & Fats](oils-fats/index.qmd)** — 36 ingredients
- **[Proteins & Meats](proteins-meats/index.qmd)** — 10 ingredients
- **[Spices & Seasonings](spices-seasonings/index.qmd)** — 68 ingredients
- **[Staples (Grains/Dals)](staples/index.qmd)** — 41 ingredients
- **[Sweeteners](sweeteners/index.qmd)** — 18 ingredients

---

*Cite as: Lalitha A R (2026). Encyclopedia of Indian Food Ingredients. Interdisciplinary Systems Research Lab (iSRL). DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18650862*
